'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/rss.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=4XYdBwRmXsa7W5J3P1AaaHlgD2_.CAqjh1y8HU1kv6M-1776422541-1.0.1.1-UCicEo9Huss_1fjKLZ.YtM.hTWe8atgQl.cU..n0Nh8"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
